name: Potato Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil and mash the potato.
2. While hot, add 2 tablespoons of butter, sugar, vanilla, and coconut to the mashed potato in a food processor or blender.
3. Transfer the mixture into a well-buttered pan and set aside to cool.
4. Melt chocolate and combine with 1 teaspoon of butter.
5. Spread the melted chocolate over the top of the cooled mixture.
6. Allow the candy to cool until the chocolate hardens.
7. Cut into squares before serving.
